subject: docs(security): add dependency vulnerability remediation to USER_ACTIONS
body:
Security audit found 5 high-severity vulnerabilities in the build tool
chain (vite-plugin-pwa → workbox-build → serialize-javascript). Runtime
impact is low but build pipeline security matters. Added as a user
action since npm audit fix --force may downgrade vite-plugin-pwa.

Tags: security, documentation, dependencies
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01D1vPh85VCNSPwbxHLjFtAF
